item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
ah, the waiting game
big non-fan of olives
as is tradition
every time
mmm hmm
i'm a guy and i want to be many of these
not my problem, bill
my bones do this a lot
finally
dang
he can has cheezburger
close enough
this was never an issue with my last dog
l
matt damon
maybe they should put the sign near the bathroom, or in it
i guess
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: My beautiful girl Delta, 14, took her final nap this weekend. I just want to share the joy she brought to my life.
item.description: From 8-14, she gave me the best 6 years I could have ever asked for.

item.description: You have reached the end. Rest now weary traveler

item.title: It can happen again.
item.description: This was from the day of the 2016 election. Ignore the polls and projections. VOTE! As much as I hope people have learned, and even though my state has no chance of flipping, I'm still making my voice heard.

item.title: Oopsies, Ouchies, & Oh Shits! #3 (Weak Willed be Warned)
item.description:
Oopsies
Ouchies
This is how unbothered I need you to be (: (Enjoy your sandwich <3)
Let’s ride!
#5
Me and Who? <3
Sign her now!
My butthole has never been tighter.
Sorry about the small penis bro.
They forget IRL has consequences
B-hee-hee-itch Slapped!
WHY
“Here boy, want a scooby snack?”
Bears clearly lift.
This must be that town from dirty dancing.
Damn, they overinflated him.
For Her
For Him
Weeeeee
Heck the police.
Right back to the argument lmao
That wasn’t a fart 0.0
Flashback to the time my mom rolled up the window on my fingers and her response to my screams of pain were a blank stare and a nonchalant “What?”
A little break for your pleasure (:
I’d kiss me. I’d kiss me so hard.
HA. HA. HA. HA. HA.
All I could find was a chive post saying no one was hurt. ^-^;
*boing* *boing* *boing* *boing* *boing*
Shocked he didn’t check if he could shoot webs.
Not the tip he expected..
I once singed my mustache while attempting to light the pipe. Feelsbadman.jpg
PEMDAS
We do not backslide in this household!
That’s it. Never ordering anything outside ever again.
PINK TEAM WINS
STOP FUCKING TOUCHING PEOPLE
You. Get. What. You. Fucking. Deserve. C:
Impeccable timing.
No sympathy for an organization that protects child abusers.
Friend? Boyfriend? Brother? Coward.
Ooh kitty.
New fear unlocked.
ONE PUNCH
Parker?
Me when I fall into a depressive episode.
She is such a mood. A bad one. But I’m sure we’ve all been there.
“Shoot me we all die!” (Thieves attempt to rob cab driver at gunpoint.)
Bbyyyeeee <3
item.dc:creator: trashpanduh

item.title: I Stole This DUMP, So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump of Pure Chaos
item.description:
1. Can't tell if this is a good thing or a bad thing :D
2. Imagine when he watches the Extended Editions too
3. The music makes it even more epic
4. A strong Darwin Award nominee: what could go wrong near a massive flood
5
6. How to fake a tequila shot
7. OVERTHINK
8. So that's who was driving the tank!
9
10. Smooth landing
11. What's your turtle review?
12. Horse rubber masks are so last decade
13
14. So apparently people will take whatever you hand them when talking on the phone...
15. Finally I would like to share with you that I'm working on a (hopefully) humorous game called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). And I'm trying to come up with wacky universes that the player can travel to. I already have the Upside Down Universe, The Chair Universe, The Universe Where Everything Is Dubbed in a Foreign Language and a few others. What else can I add? Do you have any suggestions for crazy Universes? Oh, and if you would like to support small indie devs, a simple wishlist on Steam, makes all the difference to us: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: You guys are amazing
item.description: I mentioned in a recent post that my local shelter dogs were hurting for some treats and chew bones. And freaking Imgur SHOWED UP!!! I dropped off 52 BOXES of milk bones and 90 chew bones today and there were even more boxes on my porch when I came home this afternoon! They were SHOCKED. The attendant who helped me unload my car said he had never seen so many milk bones in one place in his life. They had never gotten a donation like this before. They kept offering to give me a receipt for tax purposes but I proudly said that these were donations from my friends. Because you guys are my friends. I am so proud to be a part of this awesome community. You guys are AMAZING. (Edit: I watched the Kitten Lady’s video today on PanLeuk that so many of you told me about, so thank you. To be honest, I’m going to have to throw away most of the things in my kitten room. I’ve never dealt with this particular issue before. Ringworm, yes. That was its own kind of beast. But PanLeuk? No. I’ve got my best friend coming over this weekend to help me disinfectant the SHIT out of my kitten room. I’m gonna make sure every single trace of PanLeuk is gone. So many of you have asked if you can help donate to my cause. There are a few things here that would help: https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/2K634G59XZTP4?ref_=wl_share . But whatever happens, when the Salsa Kitties are ready to come back to me, I’ll be ready for them.)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: You can park there. You just shouldn’t have.
item.dc:creator: dickwitfo

item.title: Join me for meme dump #49 on this, the day of my cake
item.description:
Apparently it's my cake day! Join me in celebrating the fact that I should really go outside and touch grass more, but I don't because ew, Lawns are stupid.
Oh fun fact, my brain is literally broken. It's trying to escape my skull through my spine. It's called a Chiari Malformation and I learned about it a week ago.
Trying to keep my humor about it tho. Telling all my friends that my brain is so big it doesn't fit in my damn skull, lol.
Saved this because my mom would have either loved it or been horrified by it. Win win.
I have this as a built in feature
Those are rookie numbers, you've gotta bump those up. I like to bake. Ten times would be one recipe for me.
<3
"Run"??? No, I'm a pursuit predator, fuck that noise.
This is what my dad is like, but since we lost my mom, it's my sister and I narking on him to each other.
I have an almost 6 month old border collie. Yes she would absolutely do this.
100% believable, I have one of each.
Shit I forgot about this, I need to crack this out at work. Preferably around my theater friends.
Yes it is.
I am like a glowstick. I make loud crackling sounds and light up people's lives.
Sibling life
It so is, and if you disagree, look back up 2 memes.
Plato also wasn't his real name, it was his wrestling name. I don't have a source, fight me.
My first cat Cid was perfect at this. One chirp and he'd answer with his own and pop up from under a blanket like Lurch asking, "you rang?"
There must've been a duck in my work meeting this morning, because whoof, what a smell
I'd bet cash money too that someone in that town took it super seriously afterwards like, "oh right, fuck the Danes"
Already put this on the lesson slides for my psych class when we talk about Zimbardo.
Shit is that all it takes?
Hands down I would date someone who handed me a frog
This is what moral philosophy is like
Glory to you and your identity!
I will not elaborate, this is perfect as is
Saved for my perception class when we talk about art and forced perspective
Science version of who's on first
Greg.
Still wouldn't run, but I'll send this to my niece in the marching band
Imitate or mock? Knowing corvids, my vote is on mock.
Please sound on, I can't hear either song the same way anymore
Another perception image
Something something honey badger
Wilson did this to me during a class last spring. Hosting the video discussion in my home office and suddenly my sweater doesn't fit right. Nerd.
Our lakes will wreck your shit, no joke. No salt, no sharks, all attitude.
Fuck Edison, thieving bastard of a fuck wit. The only thing he was brilliant at was stealing ideas and getting to the patent office first. Also, Tesla supposedly had a loving relationship with a pigeon.
Double cat and dog tax! Clarice (L) missed Violet while she was away with her cousin for a couple of days.
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

.

item.title: I hope at 70 I can be as funny as Caroline Picard
item.description: My little sister sent me this and the first time I heard Caroline say "Fuck" with that kind of energy and ethuiasm, I almost lost my shit.

item.title: Hot Day In Botswana
item.description: Not my overheating meerkats.
item.dc:creator: dashriproc1

item.title: My youngest offspring took me to a Slipknot concert, I've been working a lot, she has school, volleyball, and a life, so we haven't spent much time together for a while. Sorry for the shitty video and sound, I'm like, 12 phones behind.
item.description:
25th Anniversary concert in Phoenix, she knows I'm a fan, and so is she. I lost my shit when she texted me, almost fell off the roof.
Sorry for the selfie, I was so excited and I don't really have friends to share stuff like this with . Anyway, make time for yourself and your loved ones, take care of yourselves, stay cool, stay hydrated, and most importantly, stay fresh cheese bags.
item.dc:creator: Jaqdakloun

item.title: Mooom water magic made me fall down. I love water magic. Weeeee water magic!.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: #CentralILlife #seriffsmatter
item.description: As a Central IL native, let me tell you: you get used to Abe impersonators everywhere. My favorites were Abe on a cell phone in 2005 and the pastor giving a speech about how an ugly man like Abe couldn't win election today while I shared a pew with a very well known Abe impersonator.
item.dc:creator: telemonianajax

item.title: Tablet clearing meme dump
item.dc:creator: WitchIrkalla

item.title: Trans Couple Tuesday
item.description:
Models: Icky & F1nn5ter https://www.instagram.com/big_icky/ https://www.instagram.com/f1nn5ter/ I adore these two so much. F1nn5ter's Instagram was removed for "copyright infringement", even though it's his account? He eventually just made a new one, that's why it's so smol. Cleary someone with an agenda was just abusing their power to remove his account, really sketchy. (F1nn5ter doesn't really call himself trans, but he says genderfluid is under the trans umbrella)
Tank!! (this is one of my favorite pictures on the internet)
Models: Alex Luxii & Michelle Alter https://www.instagram.com/alex_luxii/ https://www.instagram.com/michellexalter/ I wasn't 100% sure, but they recently confirmed in an AMA they are dating! So cute!
Models: Soapy Fate & Puppygirl W https://www.instagram.com/soapy_fate/ https://www.instagram.com/puppygirlw/ Not exactly a couple, I think they are poly!
Despite cosplaying Link a lot it seems like she's a Marth main based on some of her videos.
